basic_details.job_title: ARI Pune Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Agharkar Research Institute Pune (ARI Pune) has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 03 Project Assistant positions. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a First Class B.Sc./ B.Tech or First Class M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, or Chemical Engineering with relevant experience in anaerobic microbiology, biohydrogen, biomethane, bioethanol production, or anaerobic digestion are eligible to apply online at aripune.org. The application process will remain open until 05 August 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Relaxation will be applicable for the OBC, SC, ST, etc. categories according to the Government of India regulations.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class B.Sc./ B.Tech in microbiology or biotechnology/ chemical engineering.
qualification.details: First Class B.Sc./B.Tech in Microbiology or Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. Desirable: First Class M.Sc. Microbiology or Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. Experience in anaerobic microbiology. Experience in production of biohydrogen/biomethane/bioethanol/anaerobic digestion.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ARI Pune Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ARI Pune Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ARI Pune Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ARI Pune Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ARI Pune to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ARI Pune Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment is 05 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class B.Sc./B.Tech in Microbiology or Biotechnology/Chemical Engineering. A First Class M.Sc. in the same fields is desirable, along with experience in anaerobic microbiology and related production processes.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC, ST, and OBC categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month, along with HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Assistant post announced by Agharkar Research Institute Pune.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ARI Pune Project Assistant recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 100 for General and OBC category candidates. SC, ST, and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant post will be based on an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at ARI Pune is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for ARI Pune Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
